message:
feat(brenner-loop): export dispatch module from main index

Add re-exports for the agent dispatch API (bead xlk2.2) from the main
brenner-loop/index.ts module for consistent API access:

- AgentTaskStatus, AgentTask, TribunalAgentResponse types
- OperatorResults, AgentDispatch, CreateDispatchOptions, PollOptions types
- DEFAULT_DISPATCH_ROLES, DISPATCH_SUBJECT_PREFIX, FALLBACK_BRENNER_QUOTES constants
- createDispatch, dispatchAgentTask, dispatchAllTasks, pollForResponses functions
- checkAgentAvailability, getFallbackContent, getDispatchStatus helpers

Users can now import dispatch functionality directly from brenner-loop:
  import { createDispatch, AgentDispatch } from "./brenner-loop";

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -527,4 +527,31 @@ export {
   buildSystemPromptContext,
   getInteractionExamples,
   getModelConfig,
+
+  // Agent dispatch types (bead xlk2.2)
+  type AgentTaskStatus,
+  type AgentTask,
+  type TribunalAgentResponse,
+  type OperatorResults,
+  type AgentDispatch,
+  type CreateDispatchOptions,
+  type PollOptions,
+
+  // Agent dispatch constants
+  DEFAULT_DISPATCH_ROLES,
+  DISPATCH_SUBJECT_PREFIX,
+  FALLBACK_BRENNER_QUOTES,
+
+  // Agent dispatch functions
+  createDispatch,
+  generateThreadId,
+  formatHypothesisForPrompt,
+  formatOperatorResultsForPrompt,
+  buildAgentPrompt,
+  dispatchAgentTask,
+  dispatchAllTasks,
+  pollForResponses,
+  checkAgentAvailability,
+  getFallbackContent,
+  getDispatchStatus,
 } from "./agents";
